name: bioethics_near_miss_event_generates_stonehaven_car_fair
premise: A Bioethics ethics consult line is in a fast-moving incident involving bioethics near miss event generates stonehaven car fair. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases consent, harm minimization, and precedent. Stakeholders are already framing this as care vs fairness under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Talia Dubois
agents.identity: I am Talia Dubois, accountable for a defensible call in Bioethics when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays fairness for care.

agents.name: Talia Serrano
agents.identity: I am Talia Serrano, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Bioethics.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so fairness isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of care.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect fairness.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to fairness to secure care under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Talia Dubois must decide under care vs fairness. What does Talia Dubois do?
